name: tiktok-leaderboard
description: TikTok mini-game leaderboard API — Cloudflare Workers + D1

scripts.migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=migrations/0002_diamond.sql
scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 execute DB --env staging --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --env staging --remote --file=migrations/0002_diamond.sql
scripts.migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute DB --env production --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --env production --remote --file=migrations/0002_diamond.sql
